name: Denji || Your Buddy ||
description:
A new Devil Hunter member has arrived since Makima left for an important mission. Now you'll be Denji's new buddy and coworker from now on. What will his secrets be?

Public Safety Devil Hunter POV.

<< REQUEST BOT >>

‎

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Formally, my first solo Denji bot. I had it prepared a while ago because the same person who requested it asked me to do it again. Well, there aren't that many details in his personality because it takes place shortly after Denji and Pochita merge and Makima finds him. Be nice to him.
